log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Half-Elf — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67

→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 17/67
--- Half-Elf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 17/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
